issue_title: Nuxt Generate does not produce images
issue_body_preview:
**Nuxt version: 2.15.3
@nuxt/image version: 0.4.4
target: 'static'**

I have been using the module in dev mode with no problems. However, when trying to generate a static site using `nuxt generate` no images are produced by @nuxt/image and all images on the site 404. The generated image URLs poi
test_description_zh: 在 Nuxt 静态生成模式下（nuxt generate），访问生成的静态站点页面，检查页面中通过 @nuxt/image 组件（如 <nuxt-img> 或 <nuxt-picture>）渲染的图片是否正常显示。
expected_result_zh: 所有通过 @nuxt/image 模块渲染的图片在静态生成后能正常加载显示，图片 URL 有效，不出现 404 错误，图片在页面中正确可见。
